name: wxcode/admin-midnight-ops
title: Midnight Ops Console
description: A production-grade dark-mode operations and observability dashboard built for on-call engineers and SRE teams. Features a compact left icon rail, four live metric tiles with inline trend sparklines, a time-series throughput chart, an active incidents table with severity pills, and a per-service health status list — all in a high-contrast teal-on-midnight palette optimised for 3 AM focus.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation

query.en: Build me a dark-mode operations console — top navbar, icon rail, 4 metric tiles with trends, a time-series chart, an active incidents table with status pills, and a service-health list.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark-mode operations console — top navbar, icon rail, 4 metric tiles with trends, a time-series chart, an active incidents table with status pills, and a service-health list.
